title: odontarrhena orbelica
intro: Odontarrhena orbelica, also known as the Orbelica or White Helleborine, is a perennial plant species in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Odontarrhena orbelica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
